nodes.label: GENERATIVE AI
nodes.description: A technology that creates content, transforming creative and technology-driven industries.

nodes.label: NIXON PEABODY
nodes.description: A law firm that provides legal guidance on AI and intellectual property issues.

nodes.label: US COPYRIGHT ACT OF 1976
nodes.description: A law that requires a human author for copyright protection.

nodes.label: US PATENT AND TRADEMARK OFFICE
nodes.description: A government agency that grants patents and trademarks, requiring human inventorship.

nodes.label: DABUS
nodes.description: A legal case concerning the recognition of AI as an inventor on patent applications.

nodes.label: BEIJING INTERNET COURT
nodes.description: A court in China that recognized copyright protection for AI-generated images with human effort.

nodes.label: EU AI ACT
nodes.description: A legislative act by the European Union aimed at regulating AI and ensuring transparency.

nodes.label: WORLD INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY ORGANIZATION
nodes.description: An international organization that promotes the protection of intellectual property worldwide.

nodes.id: GENERATIVE AI COPYRIGHT DISCLOSURE ACT OF 2024
nodes.label: GENERATIVE AI COPYRIGHT DISCLOSURE ACT OF 2024
nodes.description: A proposed law requiring AI developers to disclose datasets used for training.

nodes.label: US COPYRIGHT OFFICE
nodes.description: The agency responsible for copyright registration and policy guidance.

nodes.label: AI SYSTEM
nodes.description: A system that uses artificial intelligence to generate content.

nodes.label: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
nodes.description: A technology that simulates human intelligence processes by machines, especially computer systems.

nodes.label: COPYRIGHT INFRASTRUCTURE
nodes.description: The systems and processes that support the implementation of copyright law.

nodes.label: GENAI
nodes.description: Generative AI, a type of AI that can create new content such as images, music, and text.

nodes.label: TRAINING DATA
nodes.description: Data used to train AI models, crucial for their performance and reliability.

nodes.label: AI TOOLS
nodes.description: Software applications that utilize artificial intelligence to perform tasks.

nodes.label: OPT-OUT MECHANISMS
nodes.description: Regulatory measures that allow individuals to exclude themselves from certain data uses.

nodes.label: TRANSPARENCY REQUIREMENTS
nodes.description: Regulations that mandate clear disclosure of information regarding data usage.

nodes.label: DEEPFAKES
nodes.description: AI-generated synthetic media that can manipulate images and sounds to create realistic but fake content.

nodes.label: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
nodes.description: Legal rights that grant creators control over the use of their creations.

nodes.label: COPYRIGHT LAW
nodes.description: The body of law that governs the protection of original works of authorship.

nodes.label: AI INNOVATION
nodes.description: The development and application of new AI technologies and methodologies.

nodes.label: AI INVENTIONS
nodes.description: Innovations that are created using artificial intelligence technologies.

nodes.label: IP OFFICES
nodes.description: Government agencies responsible for the administration of intellectual property rights.

nodes.label: MEMBER STATES
nodes.description: Countries that are part of the World Intellectual Property Organization.

nodes.label: POLICYMAKERS
nodes.description: Individuals responsible for creating policies related to AI and intellectual property.

nodes.label: CREATIVE INDUSTRIES
nodes.description: Sectors that focus on the creation of original content, such as art, music, and literature.

nodes.label: AI CAPACITY
nodes.description: The ability of a government or organization to develop and implement AI technologies.

nodes.label: AI REGULATORY MEASURES
nodes.description: Laws and guidelines that govern the use and development of artificial intelligence.

nodes.label: AI AND IP CLEARING HOUSE
nodes.description: A platform for sharing information and resources related to AI and intellectual property.

links.source: GENERATIVE AI COPYRIGHT DISCLOSURE ACT OF 2024
